subtitle: DEGUSTO FOOD STUDIO
title: About us
heroImageAlt: Degusto Restaurant neon sign on a green living wall with pink blossoms
missionGoalImageAlt: Degusto Food Studio dining room with warm wooden tables and brick interior

description.paragraph1: Degusto is a public food service company.
description.paragraph2: Degusto Food Studio provides services in the public food sector and was founded by Sarkis Gasparyan. Organizing public food is one of the most complex branches of the service industry and requires consistent, disciplined work.
description.paragraph3: The company has been operating for about four years. It offers customers a wide selection of dishes and also provides delivery.
description.paragraph4: It is a great choice for breakfast, a lunch break, or a warm evening meal with family or friends.

trust.subtitle: BY THE NUMBERS
trust.title: Our highlights
trust.description: Over four years we have focused on quality, freshness, and care for every guest.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.description: Our mission is to lighten people’s everyday kitchen worries, create a warm atmosphere, and serve quality food. We treat every customer with care. The company is built on three principles: cleanliness, freshness, and affordability.

goal.title: Our goal
goal.paragraph1: One of our goals is to build a brand that is known across Armenia and accessible to every audience, age, and gender — with a strong, organized, unified team.
goal.paragraph2: We aim to maintain and continuously improve the high quality of our services and to offer a personal approach to every customer.
